name: CAMDEN PROPERTY TRUST
business: Camden Property Trust is a REIT engaged in the ownership, management, development, reposition, redevelopment, acquisition, and construction of multifamily apartment communities.

exposures.sentence: We are primarily engaged in the ownership, management, development, reposition, redevelopment, acquisition, and construction of multifamily apartment communities.
We intend to continue to develop, reposition, redevelop, and construct multifamily apartment communities for our portfolio.
A cybersecurity incident and other technology disruptions could negatively impact our business.
